shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a curl command surrounded by diverse device silhouettes all running it.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a curl command surrounded by diverse device silhouettes all running it.
assets.prompt: curl | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding a tiny terminal window with "curl https://example.com" on it, surrounded by floating device silhouettes — phone, laptop, car dashboard, smart TV, medical monitor — all connected to the same curl command. Background is warm cream. Hatch looks calm and slightly amused. No speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch standing beside a vintage computer showing the IRC bot origin of curl.
assets.caption: Hatch standing beside a vintage computer showing the IRC bot origin of curl.
assets.prompt: curl | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose: standing beside a 1996-era desktop computer running an IRC chat window, with a small C program file visible — the moment Stenberg needed to fetch currency data for a bot. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. assets.alt: Hatch explaining curl as a Unix pipe component — one step in a chain, not the whole chain.
assets.caption: Hatch explaining curl as a Unix pipe component — one step in a chain, not the whole chain.
assets.prompt: curl | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, gesturing at a Unix pipe diagram: "curl https://api.example.com/data | jq '.price'" with each component as a box connected by arrows. Simple, clean, the Unix philosophy made visual. Cream background. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch pointing at 20 billion alongside device category icons showing curl's deployment scale.
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at 20 billion alongside device category icons showing curl's deployment scale.
